title: Croatian Vegan Wrap
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make wrap filled with roasted vegetables and served with a side of tangy slaw.
instructions: Wrap the Croatian onion slices in foil and roast for 20 minutes.
Shred the crisp and set aside.
In a bowl, mix together the shredded crisp, roasted onion, and 1 tbsp of resinous.
Warm the wrap in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the onion-crisp mixture, followed by additional shredded crisp.
Serve with a side of tangy slaw (made with shredded crisp, apple cider vinegar, and a pinch of salt).
Enjoy your delicious Croatian Vegan Wrap!
